mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (id, password, nickname, phone, email, register_date) VALUES (#{id}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, CURDATE())
mapper.select: SELECT USER.* FROM sns_user SNS INNER JOIN user USER ON USER.id = SNS.user_id WHERE SNS.sns_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sns_user (sns_id, user_id, client_name, linked_date) VALUES (#{snsId}, #{userId}, #{clientName}, NOW())
